overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Windows Event Log integration uses Winlogbeat to collect Windows system event logs. Supports System, Security, Application, and custom event channels, helping you monitor Windows host security events, system errors, and application behavior.

items.title: Multi-channel Support
items.description: Collect System, Security, Application, and custom event channels

items.title: Security Auditing
items.description: Monitor login events, privilege changes, security policy modifications

items.title: Fault Tracking
items.description: Capture service crashes, driver errors, application exceptions

items.title: Incremental Collection
items.description: Bookmark mechanism ensures no duplicates or missed events

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: Windows event logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:

tips.title: Privilege Requirements
tips.content: Reading Security event logs requires administrator privileges. Ensure the Winlogbeat service runs with appropriate permissions.
